findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in name import via strcpy
findings.description: strcpy copies user input into fixed-size staging buffer without bounds checking

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in CSV value processing
findings.description: Fixed-size values[64] array written with loop bound of 256 allowing overflow

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in apply_transform workspace
findings.description: Fixed-size workspace[128] overflowed when count parameter exceeds 128 from caller

findings.title: Heap buffer overflow via integer wraparound in merge_fields
findings.description: uint32_t accumulator wraps around causing undersized malloc followed by overflowing memcpy

findings.title: Heap buffer overflow via untrusted entry count in batch_import
findings.description: Untrusted entry_count from input data controls allocation and loop bounds without adequate validation

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in copy_record_names without bounds check
findings.description: dest_size parameter accepted but never used to limit writes to destination buffer
